resources.string: Allows Quick Lock to turn off and lock your screen when you tap the Quick Settings tile. This service does not read anything on your screen.
If prompted, tap Add. The Lock tile is now available in Quick Settings.
Step 1: Turn on the accessibility permission. This lets the tile lock your screen. Tap the button, find \"Quick Lock\", and switch it on.
Step 2: Add the Lock tile to your Quick Settings pull-down. Tap the button below, then tap Add when asked.
You only do this once. After that, one tap on the Lock tile locks your phone.
